_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.446), SP-K-012 (SP, cosine: 0.444).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.515). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [intrusion, sets] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, audit, controls, data, encryption, identity] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.915, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.063 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Knowledge of intrusion sets." and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.452 < STS 0.515 (gap -0.063). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [intrusion, sets] and [access, audit, controls] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [knowledge]. DCWF-only: [intrusion, sets]. WIDAI-only: [access, audit, controls, data, encryption, identity].
